center.name: 納米比沙漠
center.summary: 納米比沙漠是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Namaqua sandgrouse、斑翡翠、桃面愛情鳥等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In addition, it is also found in Namibia (especially in the Namib Desert), Zimbabwe, Botswana and Angola

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Females drinking at a waterhole in Namibia The Cape sparrow inhabits southern Africa south of Angola and as far east as Eswatini. The northernmost point in its range is Benguela in Angola, and it is found in the coastal and central parts of Namibia, except for the driest parts of the Namib Desert

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species occurs in Sub-Saharan Africa except in dense forests (especially near the Congo River), the Horn of Africa, the Namib Desert and South Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Courting pair, Namibia The rosy-faced lovebird (Agapornis roseicollis), also known as the rosy-collared or peach-faced lovebird, is a species of lovebird native to the Namibian savanna woodlands
